title: Language RTL Support — add isRTL flag to languagereducer for Arabic / Hebrew / Farsi / Urdu users
commit_message: feat: add RTL_LANGUAGES constant, isRtlLanguage() utility, and isRTL state field to languagereducer
changed_symbols: isRtlLanguage (new utility — case-insensitive check against RTL_LANGUAGES)
languagereducer (modified — initial state gains isRTL: false; LANGUAGE case now also sets isRTL based on RTL_LANGUAGES.includes(action.data))

what_the_diff_does.before: languagereducer only stores selectlanguage: 'en'. When a user switches to Arabic or Hebrew, the app stores the code but has no flag to flip the UI to right-to-left layout. Every component that needs RTL logic must re-derive it from the language code independently.
what_the_diff_does.after: languagereducer.isRTL is computed on every LANGUAGE dispatch and stored centrally in Redux state. Components read state.languagereducer.isRTL to decide layout direction — no per-component re-derivation needed. isRtlLanguage(code) in utilities.js exposes the same check for use outside Redux. RTL_LANGUAGES in actiotypes.js defines the authoritative list of right-to-left language codes.
what_the_diff_does.visible_change: When a user selects Arabic, Hebrew, Farsi, or Urdu in the language settings, the entire app layout mirrors to right-to-left. Selecting any other language restores left-to-right.
what_the_diff_does.compile_note: languagereducer is backward-compatible: isRTL is false for all existing callers since 'en', 'fr', 'es', etc. are not in RTL_LANGUAGES. The initial state change from a single-line object to a two-field object is non-breaking.

CRITICAL.reason: Two files contribute CRITICAL tests: (1) auth-reducers.feature.test.js — describe('languagereducer') matches the changed symbol, 4 tests CRITICAL. (2) language-rtl.feature.test.js — declares actiotypes.js, utilities.js, and languagereducer.js as sources and contains describe('RTL_LANGUAGES') 7 tests, describe('isRtlLanguage') 9 tests, describe('languagereducer — isRTL') 8 tests — all 24 are CRITICAL. Total CRITICAL: 28.
tests: languagereducer > initialises with default language code 'en'
languagereducer > LANGUAGE stores a new language code
languagereducer > LANGUAGE can switch between multiple languages
languagereducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action type

HIGH.reason: Three files qualify as HIGH: (1) The remaining 26 tests in auth-reducers.feature.test.js (signUpReducer, loginUserNameReducer, etc.) share the file whose sources include languagereducer.js — a changed file. (2) utilities.pure.test.js declares src/helpers/utilities.js as its source — utilities.js is changed. (3) favourites-watchlist.feature.test.js declares src/reducer/actiotypes.js as a source — actiotypes.js is changed.

SKIP.reason: All remaining test files do not declare actiotypes.js, utilities.js, or languagereducer.js as a source.

coverage_gaps.gap: Covered by 7 tests in describe('RTL_LANGUAGES') in language-rtl.feature.test.js.
Covered by 9 tests in describe('isRtlLanguage') in language-rtl.feature.test.js.
Covered by 8 tests in describe('languagereducer — isRTL') in language-rtl.feature.test.js.

jest_run_note: language-rtl.feature.test.js runs 24 CRITICAL tests. auth-reducers.feature.test.js runs 4 CRITICAL + 26 HIGH tests. utilities.pure.test.js adds 61 HIGH tests. favourites-watchlist.feature.test.js adds 24 HIGH tests. All 3 gaps closed.
